summary: Iteration 22 - Testing Community/Chat fixes: Online users visibility, All users list in Chat tab, Private messaging. Backend: 10/10 tests PASSED. Frontend: UI components verified correct (authentication issue in web preview prevents full e2e test).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/community/users correctly returns all users (excluding current user) with user_id, name, is_online fields
Online strip always visible in community.tsx (lines 269-298) with empty state message 'Nessun utente online al momento'
Chat tab correctly shows both existing conversations AND 'Tutti gli utenti' section with online/offline status (lines 310-382)
Private chat screen has input field and send button with data-testid attributes for testing
Heartbeat uses 2-minute threshold in /api/community/users endpoint (line 2163 in server.py) vs 5-minute for /api/users/online

success_rate.frontend: UI verified via screenshots - login/auth flow not testable in web preview

seed_data_creation: Used existing user 'Desire' (user_3acb0d89385a) for private message testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs for community/chat features are working. Frontend UI components are correctly implemented. Web preview has authentication limitations but native app should work correctly.

GET /api/community/users.returns: All registered users (excluding current user) with user_id, name, is_online boolean

GET /api/private-messages/conversations.response: List of conversations with unread counts

ui_chat_tab.notes: Chat tab shows conversations + 'Tutti gli utenti' section

ui_online_strip.notes: Always visible, shows 'Nessun utente online al momento' when empty

ui_private_chat.notes: Has input field, send button, back button with proper data-testid attributes

screenshots_analysis.community_page: Shows Community/Chat tabs, Online (0) strip with empty message, message input area
screenshots_analysis.chat_tab: Shows 'Nessun utente registrato' because auth failed in web preview, but UI structure is correct

notes: Web preview has authentication issues (login doesn't persist when navigating directly to /community). However, the UI components are correctly implemented as verified by code review and screenshots.
